title: Fiasterium Japanese Translation Pack
description:
様々なmod を日本語にするテクスチャです
Textures to make various mods Japanese
body:
# Fiasterium Japanese Translation Pack For MC1.20.1

## 日本語
こちらのテクスチャは様々なMODを日本語に翻訳するものです。

機械翻訳を用いてるものもあり、違和感があるかもしれませんがご了承ください。

追加してほしいMODがありましたらコメントまでお願いします。

### 対応MOD
- [Battle Arts - API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/battle-arts-api)
- [Epic Fight - Battle Arts](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/battle-arts)
- [Epic Fight - Guandao Moveset](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/epic-fight-guandao-moveset)
- [FTB Quests (Forge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-quests-forge)
- [L2 Artifacts](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/l2-artifacts)
- [L2 Hostility](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/l2hostility)
- [Legendary Survival Overhaul](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/legendary-survival-overhaul)
- [Mine And Slash](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mine-and-slash-reloaded)
- [Serene Seasons](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/serene-seasons)
- [Passive Skill Tree](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/passive-skill-tree)
- [Spartan Weaponry](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/spartan-weaponry)
- [Storage Drawers Extras](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/storage-drawers-extras)
- [Trash Cans](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/trash-cans)
- [Twilight Delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/twilight-delight)
- [Weapons of Miracles - epic fight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/weapons-of-miracles-epicfight)
- [Zombie Awareness](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/zombie-awareness)
- [Zombie Island](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/zombie-island)

## English
These textures are translations of various mods into Japanese.

Please note that some of them are machine-translated and may not look right.

If you have any mods you would like to see added, please leave a comment.

## Supported Mods
- [Battle Arts - API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/battle-arts-api)
- [Epic Fight - Battle Arts](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/battle-arts)

- [Passive Skill Tree](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/passive-skill-tree)
- [Spartan Weaponry](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/spartan-weaponry)

- [Trash Cans](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/trash-cans)
- [Twilight Delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/twilight-delight)
- [Weapons of Miracles - epic fight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/weapons-of-miracles-epicfight)
